What is AI Pulse?

AI Pulse - Model Radar is a self-contained HTML file that lets you compare 600+ AI models from 170+ companies — pricing, context windows, benchmarks, and licensing — entirely offline, with no backend, no API keys, and no subscription.

What you get

What You Get: 600+ Models, 170+ Companies, One Dashboard

AI Pulse is a single-file dashboard that compares 600+ AI models side by side. No backend, no install. Run the Python update script to pull in new models within a day of release.

  • 600+ models from 170+ companies, always growing
  • Price, context window, benchmarks, license — in one row
  • Compare any models side by side — export as PDF, PNG, or CSV
  • Provider Radar — see where a model is free across 10+ APIs
  • Cost analysis — input/output pricing per 1K and 1M tokens
  • 10 interactive charts — trends, categories, benchmarks
  • Python update pipeline — no extra packages, run it anytime
  • Local file — no cloud, no account, no tracking

How it works

How It Works: Download, Open, Update

Download

The dashboard, seed data and Python tools land on your machine.

Open

Open the HTML file in your browser. 600+ models are already loaded.

Update

Double-click the update script. New models flow in. As often as you like.

Comparison

AI Pulse vs ChatGPT Plus, Perplexity, and Manual Comparison

People choose AI tools in three ways — a premium assistant subscription, an AI answer engine, or a do-it-yourself spreadsheet. Here is how AI Pulse differs from each.

AI Pulse vs ChatGPT Plus

ChatGPT Plus ($20/month) is one assistant you chat with. AI Pulse is a local, open data layer that compares 600+ models side by side on capability, price, and context window — including models ChatGPT cannot show you. You own the file; no subscription.

AI Pulse vs Perplexity

Perplexity answers questions with live web sources. AI Pulse answers a different question: "which model should I actually use and pay for?" It is a structured, sortable comparison you can audit, export, and update yourself.

AI Pulse vs Manual Comparison

A DIY spreadsheet goes stale in weeks. AI Pulse ships with an update pipeline that pulls the latest models from HuggingFace and OpenRouter into your file, so your comparison stays current without manual research.

Option Best for Cost Owned data
AI Pulse Comparing 600+ models on price, capability, context One-time Yes (local HTML)
ChatGPT Plus Daily chat with one assistant $20/month No
Perplexity Live web answers Freemium No
Manual spreadsheet Custom, static notes Free Yes (but stale)
Questions

Frequently Asked Questions About AI Pulse

What does "update yourself" mean?

The data isn't frozen. Run the pipeline script and it pulls the latest models from HuggingFace and OpenRouter into your file.

What's the difference between demo and full version?

The demo has ~50 models. The full version has 600+, the update pipeline, and richer pricing and trend data.

Is my data private?

Yes. It's a local HTML file on your machine. No account, no cloud, no tracking.

What Python version do I need?

Python 3.8 or higher. No extra packages — just run the script.

Does it work offline?

Yes. Once downloaded, the dashboard works without internet. You only go online when you run the update pipeline.
